title: 移除今天新增的 Ask 审查动作
prompt:
GOAL: Completely remove the "Ask" review action feature that was added TODAY (2026-06-23). The user has decided to drop it. Do a clean removal, not a blind `git revert`, because one piece is shared and must stay.

The three commits that introduced it (newest → oldest):
- 37a306b5  feat(review): add "Ask" split-button action to review cards (web-ui)
- b050e79e  feat(review): backend support for the "Ask" review action
- 76dae503  feat(review): add generic "inject prompt into session" primitive for Ask

REMOVE (Ask-specific, web-ui + backend):
- web-ui/src/components/board-card-ask-control.tsx (+ .test.tsx)
- web-ui/src/hooks/use-ask-action.ts (+ .test.tsx)
- web-ui/src/git-actions/build-ask-prompt.ts and ask-guardrail.ts (+ any tests)
- App.tsx: drop `import { useAskAction }` and its wiring
- board-card.tsx: drop BoardCardAskControl import/usage and the Ask-only comment
- Backend "Ask" review handling introduced in b050e79e
- Stale "Ask" doc-comment references in src/core/api-contract.ts (~line 1290 reviewQuestion, ~line 2099), trpc/runtime-api.ts (~869), src/session/home-thread-store.ts comments

KEEP — DO NOT REMOVE (this is the critical constraint):
- The generic "inject prompt into session" primitive: runtimeSessionPromptRequestSchema / injectSessionPrompt / the unified delivery path. The Commit and PR review actions ALSO depend on it. Commit 76dae503 named it "for Ask" but it is shared — keep the primitive, remove only the Ask caller. Verify Commit/PR still build and work.
- The `reviewQuestion` summary field itself (just fix its comment; the field has independent value).
- Unrelated legitimate "ask" usages that are NOT the review action: the `permission.ask` hook in src/terminal/agent-session-adapters.ts, "ask for approval before making changes" prompt text (pi-system-prompt.ts, append-system-prompt.ts), and the OAuth "ask the user to paste an API key" comment.

ACCEPTANCE:
- No remaining references to the Ask review action (board-card-ask-control, use-ask-action, build-ask-prompt, ask-guardrail) anywhere.
- Commit/PR review actions still function (shared inject primitive intact).
- `bun run typecheck`, `web:typecheck`, biome/lint, and the test suite all clean.
